name: Antelope Valley Sch Bus Trnst
owner_or_parent: Joint Powers Authority (public agency) - member districts: Antelope Valley Union HSD, Lancaster SD, Westside Union SD
districts_or_customers: Antelope Valley Union High School District
recent_news: AVSTA (Antelope Valley Schools Transportation Agency) operates as a Joint Powers Authority transporting 6,000+ students daily on 88 special-needs and 41 regular-ed routes; has secured $11M+ in clean-fuel/bus grants since 1993.
fit_notes: NOT A TUCK-IN TARGET. AVSTA is a public Joint Powers Authority (in-house consortium owned by three California school districts), not a private operator. Cannot be acquired. The data record (670 7th St W, 10 employees, $502K rev) is a stale/incorrect single-location capture; real agency has ~200 employees and 200 buses at 670 W Ave L-8.

name: Council School Bus Corp
recent_news: No public news, web presence, or M&A activity located. Company is a small Mississippi corporation registered at 3543 Old Brandon Rd, Jackson/Pearl MS 39208 (Rankin County line); Hugh E. Jones listed as officer.
fit_notes: Very small Mississippi single-location operator (~12 employees, ~$486K rev), likely owner-operator. Note that the vast majority of Mississippi school transportation is run in-house by districts (Jackson Public Schools fields ~246 buses internally), so private contractor footprint is structurally limited. Low strategic priority; needs phone verification to confirm operations and contract base.

name: Downs & Downs Tng LLC
recent_news: Long-standing Calvert County independent school bus contractor (est. 1965); operates from Chesapeake Beach MD with secondary listing in Prince Frederick MD. No M&A or news activity found.
fit_notes: Classic 60-year-old family operator in the Calvert County contractor system - exactly the small/aging-owner tuck-in profile Summit targets. Succession risk is high (founded 1965, single principal Bowie Downs). Sub-scale (~7 buses) so financially marginal alone, but attractive when bundled with other Maryland MSBCA contractors as part of a Maryland-Delaware roll-up around the existing Calvert/Charles/St. Mary's contractor pool.

name: Mellor's Bus Svc
recent_news: Women-owned HCPSS contractor since 1987; holds HCPSS contract for school bus service supporting athletic and allied sports activities; also offers charter service.
fit_notes: Small (~10 employee) WBE Howard County contractor with charter add-on; 39 years in business under single owner Annette Mellor - succession profile is favorable. HCPSS uses an independent-contractor model with dozens of small operators, making Mellor's a credible bolt-on in a Maryland mini-rollup. Needs deeper fleet/route count and contract renewal date diligence before sizing.

name: All In One Complete Bus Svc
recent_news: Yelp listing 'All In One Complete Business Service' at 2906 Lamar Ave, Memphis is marked CLOSED as of May 2026. No active web/phone presence found for a Memphis school-bus operation under this name; SCS (Memphis-Shelby County Schools) runs transportation in-house. Not to be confused with active Memphis airport shuttle 'All In One Transportation' (Christopher Burton).
fit_notes: NOT A TUCK-IN TARGET. Business appears closed/dissolved; even when operating, was likely a single-location transportation/courier service rather than a school-bus contractor (Memphis-Shelby County Schools operates its own fleet). Skip - drop from active pipeline.
